ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institute */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the institute */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "campus_size" TEXT /* Size of the institute's campus */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 4 Years) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree awarded (e.g., Bachelor of Technology) */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "admission_test_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if an admission test is required */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota type */,
  "quota_type" TEXT /* Type of quota (e.g., AI, OBC-NCL, SC, ST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quota type */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of seats reserved for the quota */,
  "regulation_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the regulatory document that mandates the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program offered */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota associated with the seat */,
  "seat_type" TEXT /* Type of seat (e.g., OPEN, OBC-NCL) */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the category */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the current year */,
  "filled_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats that have been filled */,
  "remaining_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats that are still available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program being admitted to */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota associated with the admission */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender associated with the admission (if applicable) */,
  "opening_rank" INTEGER /* Opening rank for admission */,
  "closing_rank" INTEGER /* Closing rank for admission */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of admission */,
  "total_applications" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received */,
  "admitted_students" INTEGER /* Number of students admitted */,
  "rejected_applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications rejected */,
  "waitlist_count" INTEGER /* Number of students on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_quota" (
  "gender_quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender quota entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the gender quota */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender specified for the quota (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota associated with the gender */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the gender category */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the current year */,
  "filled_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats that have been filled */,
  "remaining_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats that are still available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_quota_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_quota_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year associated with admissions */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round entry */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number associated with admissions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round (e.g., First Round, Second Round) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the admission round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the admission round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Super Admin, Admissions Officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "application_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the applicant applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant submitting the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the application is for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "application_fee" TEXT /* Application fee paid by the applicant */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "admission_test_score" TEXT /* Score of the admission test, if applicable */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the applicant in the admission process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)
